chapter_title.en: Chapter on Fasting for Menstruating and Post-Menstrual Women

text: 1992 - وَ رَوَى اَلْعِيصُ بْنُ اَلْقَاسِمِ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ: سَأَلْتُهُ عَنِ اَلْمَرْأَةِ تَطْمَثُ فِي شَهْرِ رَمَضَانَ قَبْلَ أَنْ تَغِيبَ اَلشَّمْسُ قَالَ «تُفْطِرُ حِينَ تَطْمَثُ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1992 - It was narrated from Al-Ays bin Al-Qasim:
"I asked Abu Abdullah (as) about a woman who begins menstruating during Month of Ramadan before sunset.
Imam (as) said: 'She should break her fast as soon as she begins menstruating.'"
